rationale: distance recovery should preserve the simulated unrooted topology
Brownian root-state recovery should remain close on the true tree
Brownian sigma-squared recovery should stay within one small-rate band
OU alpha should recover the generating grid value exactly or within one tight tolerance
OU optimum recovery should remain close to the generating optimum
OU sigma-squared recovery should remain within a narrow absolute error band
generic discrete ancestral states should recover every internal simulated state in this panel
host-state ancestral reconstruction should recover every internal simulated host state in this panel
host-switch branch changes should match the simulated branch events exactly in this panel
geographic ancestral states should recover every internal simulated region state in this panel
geographic branch transitions should match the simulated branch events exactly in this panel
